name: Aaron Heick
abstract: Aaron Heick is an American saxophonist and woodwind player, born September 13, 1961, in Seattle, currently living in New York. He is best known for his work on the CBS Orchestra for the Late Show with David Letterman.

about_quotes.speaker: Paul Shaffer
about_quotes.evidence: get everybody including Will who flew in from the South of France to do this, and other guys, Aaron Heick on saxophone flew from the Caribbean or something. You know we were dying to play together again though
